info.description: Point-in-time snapshot of a document taken before a sync overwrites it — used for rollback

options.comment: Managed by strapi-plugin-env-sync. Do not modify manually.

contentType.comment: Strapi UID of the snapshotted content type

documentId.comment: documentId of the document that was snapshotted

locale.comment: Locale of the snapshotted document version, null for non-i18n

environment.comment: The environment where this snapshot was taken

snapshotData.comment: Full serialised document data at the time of snapshot, including all locales

mediaManifest.comment: List of media files referenced in this snapshot: [{ id, hash, url, name }]

takenBy.comment: Admin user who triggered the sync that caused this snapshot

logId.comment: References the env-sync-log entry that created this snapshot

isRestored.comment: Set to true once this snapshot has been used to roll back

sizeBytes.comment: Approximate size of snapshotData in bytes — for storage monitoring

checksum.comment: SHA-256 hash of snapshotData — integrity verification before restore
